description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
eCommerce token generation for certificate collection
Generates a token for embedding the CertCapture certificate collection widget in eCommerce checkout flows.
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

The Avalara CertCapture RESTful API provides document management for tax-exempt sales, including managing exemption certificates, customer records, custom attributes, authentication tokens, and eCommerce token generation. It supports the full certificate lifecycle from creation through validation and expiry tracking.
